back_translation: In You, O LORD, I have taken refuge; let me never be put to shame.
In Your righteousness, rescue and deliver me; incline Your ear to listen to me and save me.
Be my rock of refuge, a place where I can always go for shelter; give the command to save me, for You are my rock and my fortress.
O my God, deliver me from the hand of the wicked, from the grasp of the unjust and ruthless.
O Lord GOD, for You are my hope, my confidence from my youth.
I have leaned on You since birth; You brought me out from my mother's womb; I will always praise You.
I have become like a sign to many, but You are my strong refuge.
My mouth is filled with Your praise and with Your glory all day long.
Do not cast me away in my old age; do not forsake me when my strength fails.
For my enemies speak against me, and those who lie in wait for my life conspire together,
saying, 'God has forsaken him; pursue and seize him, for there is no one to rescue him.'
O God, do not be far from me; O my God, hurry to help me.
Let those who accuse me be put to shame and perish; let those who seek my ruin be covered with scorn and disgrace.
But I will always hope, and I will praise You more and more.
My mouth will declare Your righteousness and Your salvation all day long, though I cannot count their full measure.
I will come in the strength of the Lord GOD; I will proclaim Your righteousness, Yours alone.
O God, You have taught me from my youth, and to this day I still proclaim Your marvelous deeds.
O God, even when I am old and gray, do not forsake me, until I proclaim Your power to the next generation, and tell of Your might to all who are to come.
O God, Your righteousness reaches to the heavens, You who have done great things; O God, who is like You?
Though You have made me experience many troubles and hardships, You will revive me again, and You will bring me up again from the depths of the earth.
You will increase my honor and comfort me once again.
O my God, I will praise You with the harp for Your faithfulness; O Holy One of Israel, I will sing praises to You with the lyre.
When I sing praises to You, my lips will shout for joy, along with my soul, which You have redeemed.
My tongue will speak of Your righteousness all day long, for those who seek my ruin are put to shame and humiliated.
